title: Archidendron chevalieri
taxonomy: Archidendron chevalieri is a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is a climbing tree that can grow up to 10 meters tall. The species is classified within the genus Archidendron, which is a group of tropical and subtropical trees and shrubs. The genus Archidendron is part of the subfamily Faboideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within the Fabaceae family. Archidendron chevalieri is also known by its synonym, Archidendron pauciflorum.
